observe: Both at once here — segments for meaning, pages inside each one for flexibility. Don't lose track of which segment you're paging within.
fault: You paged correctly but forgot the segment it belongs to. An address without its segment means nothing up here.
repair: Hold both pieces together. Segment first, then page within it.
escape: Don't drop the segment context — the page alone won't save you.

observe: Segmentation with paging combines segment-level structure with page-level allocation.
fault: A page reference is missing its segment context.
repair: Resolve each address using both segment and page information.

hints: Every address here needs two coordinates: which segment, then which page within it.
